disclaimer: Research Use Only. Not cleared for clinical decision-making.

crispr_activation.title: In vivo CRISPRa screen for breast-to-brain metastasis drivers
crispr_activation.citation: Chafe et al. Sci Transl Med 2025
crispr_activation.pmid: PENDING — Chafe 2025 bioRxiv precursor PMID not yet assigned
crispr_activation.cell_line: CRUK0748 (human breast cancer, Calabrese A CRISPRa library)

samples.t0_pellet: GSM7616089 — supplementary data not provided; T0 normalization done upstream

crispr_activation.method: log2(mean_brain_count + 1) - log2(mean_lung_count + 1) per gene, across all guides
crispr_activation.note: GeneID format is GENESYMBOL_CalA_GUIDEINDEX — gene symbol embedded, no external mapping required

superseded_reference.title: MDA-MB-231 Par/BrM2/LM ATAC-seq
superseded_reference.role: Provides locus-level BrM2 vs Par differential accessibility for 6 key gene windows. NOT the primary ATAC source for Target-Lock v2 scoring.
superseded_reference.why_not_primary: GSE129646 uses MDA-MB-231 breast cancer cell lines (in vitro). GSE205033 uses primary melanoma BrM patient samples (in vivo, multi-patient). In vivo patient data is the correct source for the BrM target universe.

v3_computed_files: data/brain_met/gse205033_real_atac_mbm_ecm.json (14,269 genes, MBM vs ECM DESeq2 LFC)
atac.v3_note: DESeq2 normalized counts used directly. 12 MBM vs 12 ECM samples. 17,797 peaks mapped to 14,269 gene loci (±50kb window from gene_coords_cache.json). Key findings: ATP10D +0.227, SLC25A32 +0.302, FAM72A -0.106, BACE1 -0.262.

clinical_mutations.title: MSK-MET pan-cancer metastatic mutation landscape
clinical_mutations.brain_filter_note: data_clinical_sample.txt not available. Pan-cohort frequencies used. Key BrM targets (FAM72A, SLC25A32, ATP10D, BACE1, BIN1) are NOT in the 492-gene MSK-IMPACT panel — clinical burden score 0 is correct, not a data gap.
clinical_mutations.brain_filter_method: METASTATIC_SITE contains 'Brain' OR 'CNS' OR DMETS_DX_CNS_BRAIN == 'Yes' in data_clinical_sample.txt (Zenodo 5801902)

rnaseq.title: Matched breast-to-brain metastasis RNA-seq
rnaseq.citation: Cai et al. 2022 (AURORA breast BrM cohort)
rnaseq.pmid: AURORA dataset — primary citation pending verification
rnaseq.output_file: data/brain_met/rnaseq_gene_scores.json (16,714 genes, BrM vs primary LFC)
rnaseq.status: REAL — parsed 2026-03-28 via ENSEMBL symbol map

gtex_safety.title: GTEx v8 multi-tissue gene expression — brain regions

evo2_deployment.model_source: ArcInstitute/evo2 (GitHub, pinned to HEAD at deploy time)
evo2_deployment.hardware: A100 (SM8.0, BF16, FP8 disabled via patches.py)
evo2_deployment.weight_rationale: Pearson r=0.016 between Evo2 conditional_ll and CRISPRa brain LFC (189 genes). Evo2 is orthogonal to gene-level BrM function. Correct use: clinical variant hotspot scoring only.
patches_required: patches.py: FP8 disabled via check_fp8_support + fp8_available=True
TE 1.13 pinned (cuDNN 8 compat — do NOT bump without migrating to cuDNN 9+ base)

longevity_validation.verdict: CANCER-ONLY for pathogenicity direction inference. Ancestral alleles (APOE e4) produce positive delta_ll — sign does not indicate clinical safety. Common longevity SNPs require epidemiological cohort calibration.
longevity_validation.key_finding: APOE e2 vs e4 separation = 1.646 delta_ll. Largest in panel. Reflects evolutionary allele ancestry (e4 = ancestral = expected by model), not clinical direction.

regime_b_contract_validated.do_not: pos +/- 4096 symmetric (8193bp wrong idx), RC for minus-strand genes

panel_scored.note: longevity SNP — more negative than TP53, uninformative for longevity

honest_auroc.negative_rationale: solid-tumor false-positives: frequently mutated, NOT enriched in GSE237446 brain screen
honest_auroc.anchor_verified: TP53 R175H = -0.4177124500274658 (0.000000 deviation across both run dates)
honest_auroc.provenance: 9 genes from 2026-03-28 live_variant_scores.json + 29 re-scored 2026-04-13, cross-check delta=0 for all 9 overlaps

failure_mode_1.label: Conservation conflation
failure_mode_1.description: Conserved negatives score as disruptive — Evo2 cannot distinguish 'essential to all metazoa' from 'BrM-specific'. VEGFB=-0.5536, SMAD4=-0.3819, KRAS=-0.2085.
failure_mode_1.implication: Evo2 penalizes missense at conserved positions regardless of BrM relevance

failure_mode_2.label: Functional invisibility
failure_mode_2.description: Best-validated BrM target scores near-neutral. BACE1 +0.0017 despite CRISPRa LFC +7.28 and Chafe 2025 STM validation. BACE1 BrM mechanism (BACE1→EGFR→MEK→ERK) is functional/contextual, invisible to evolutionary sequence constraint.
failure_mode_2.implication: BrM functional mechanisms are not encoded in cross-species nucleotide conservation

weight_locked.rationale: AUROC 0.5778 confirms r=0.016 Pearson finding. Evo2 measures evolutionary constraint, not BrM biology. 5% weight is the empirically correct and now doubly-validated assignment. Do not increase without a new calibration study showing AUROC > 0.70 on a prospective holdout.

evo2_deployment.use_case_note: Evo2 1b conditional LL: validated for rare pathogenic hotspots on conserved positions. AUROC=0.5778 on BrM target discrimination (n=29, honest negatives). Not useful for functional BrM mechanisms (BACE1 proof). Not useful for longevity SNPs (FOXO3/APOE analysis 2026-04-10). 5% weight in Target-Lock v2 is LOCKED.

target_lock_v2.normalization: min-max per signal across all scored genes
target_lock_v2.atac_source: GSE205033 (primary, 261k peaks, melanoma BrM in vivo)
target_lock_v2.atac_source_v3: GSE205033 DESeq2 normalized counts, MBM vs ECM LFC (12vs12)

assassin_score.structure_pending: AF3 Cas9 RNP jobs submitted for Top 5 (SLC25A32 partial iptm=0.420)

frozen_top_5.note: ATAC locus not in ±50kb window — coord cache may need wider window

notable_drops.reason: 37.1 TPM MODERATE GTEx safety flag — tumor-specific guide design required
140.3 TPM HIGH_RISK — neurotoxicity concern. Safety gate correctly deprioritizes.
Real CRISPRa LFC +6.89 vs imputed +7.07 — marginal delta, still #2. Synthetic repressor valid.

fam72a_repressor.prompt: FAM72A TSS context 501bp (NC_000001.11:206205272-206206272 hg38 minus-strand RC)
fam72a_repressor.sae_feature: f/15680 (coding region — activated via exon1 coding context)
fam72a_repressor.validation_required: Luciferase reporter assay (WT vs repressor#1 vs repressor#3+CpG)

unresolved.description: data_clinical_sample.txt not available — MSK-MET brain-specific filter cannot be applied
unresolved.impact: Clinical burden scores for all targets = 0.0 (correct but conservative). Pan-cohort frequencies used instead.
unresolved.resolution: Obtain data_clinical_sample.txt from Zenodo 5801902 and re-run mskmet extraction
unresolved.resolution_applied: MSK-MET brain filter: 2,921 samples, 476 genes, mskmet_brain_burden_real.json

unresolved.description: GSE237446 T0 pellet (GSM7616089) has no supplementary count data — only raw SRA reads
unresolved.impact: LFC computed as brain vs lung without T0 normalization. Absolute enrichment scores may differ from MAGeCK output.
unresolved.resolution: Download SRA reads, align, count, then re-run with 3-condition MAGeCK (T0, brain, lung)

unresolved.description: AF3 Cas9 RNP jobs for FAM72A, ATP10D, BACE1, BIN1 not yet submitted (specs ready)
unresolved.impact: Structure score = 0.5 (pending) for 4 of top 5 targets. SLC25A32 partial iptm=0.420.
unresolved.resolution: Submit af3_cas9_rnp_*.json to alphafoldserver.com (10 jobs/day limit)

unresolved.description: SENP8 Evo2 steered generation not yet run (FAM72A only)
unresolved.impact: Repressor sequences available for #2 target only
unresolved.resolution: Run fam72a_evo2_steered.py pattern against SENP8 promoter context

unresolved.description: GSE124379 H3K27ac bedgraph files delivered in error (wrong dataset, wrong data type). Files rejected.
unresolved.impact: No impact — GSE205033 is canonical ATAC. H3K27ac pileup tracks cannot substitute for ATAC open chromatin.
unresolved.resolution: Do not integrate GSM3530739/GSM3530746. GSE205033 DESeq2 counts are now processed.
unresolved.status: RESOLVED — files rejected, GSE205033 used instead
